samples.name: Box Pyramid
samples.description: Boxes stacked into a pyramid, settling on the ground — the canonical resting-contact test.

samples.name: Dominoes
samples.description: Concentric rings of dominoes kicked into a chain reaction by a single impulse.

samples.name: Arch
samples.description: A masonry arch of wedge voussoirs standing on friction alone, loaded with loose boxes.

samples.name: Shape Soup
samples.description: Spheres, capsules, and boxes dropped together — every convex primitive in one scene.

samples.name: Restitution
samples.description: A drop of bodies with restitution ramping 0 → 1 — the bounce ladder, sphere or box.

samples.name: Inclined Plane
samples.description: Boxes released on a ramp with rising friction — the low-friction box slides, the grippy one holds.

samples.name: Body Type
samples.description: A platform carrying crates, re-typed live between kinematic, dynamic, and static.

samples.name: Spinning Book
samples.description: Books spinning in free fall — the intermediate-axis one flips (the Dzhanibekov effect).

samples.name: Motion Locks
samples.description: Hovering cubes under torque with different angular locks — rotation only about unlocked axes.

samples.name: Convex Primitives
samples.description: Cylinders, cones, and rocks — the built-in convex hull generators dropped together.

samples.name: Convex Hull
samples.description: Random point clouds turned into convex polytopes with createHull — a pile of unique shapes.

samples.name: Hull Reduction
samples.description: A sphere point cloud capped to N hull vertices — the slider trades detail for vertex budget.

samples.name: Pendulum
samples.description: A chain of boxes on revolute joints, swinging out and settling under gravity.

samples.name: Suspension
samples.description: A platform hung from four distance-joint springs — drop crates and it bobs.

samples.name: Cantilever
samples.description: Welded boxes jutting from a wall as a diving board — the stiffness knob is the weld's spring.

samples.name: Elevator
samples.description: A prismatic platform motored up and down between limits, carrying crates — stays level, only slides.

samples.name: Rope
samples.description: A capsule rope on spherical joints, released from horizontal — it swings and coils in 3D.

samples.name: Parallel
samples.description: Two panels under torque — a parallel joint locks one level while the free one tumbles.

samples.name: Paddle
samples.description: A motor joint spins a paddle at a set speed, batting a pile of loose boxes around.

samples.name: Filter
samples.description: A filter joint mutes one box-platform contact so it falls through, while its twin rests on top.

samples.name: Bridge
samples.description: A plank bridge on paired spherical hinges — it folds along the span but never twists. Drop boxes to sag it.

samples.name: Driving
samples.description: A car on wheel joints: rear wheels spin, front wheels steer, suspension springs at each corner. Throttle and steer live.

samples.name: Ragdoll
samples.description: A capsule humanoid dropped from a height, folding at its limited joints as it settles.

samples.name: Falling Ragdolls
samples.description: A grid of ragdolls falling into a pile — the settled pose hashes the same on every run.

samples.name: Thin Wall
samples.description: Fast projectiles hurled at a thin wall — swept collision stops them instead of tunnelling through.

samples.name: Bullet vs Stack
samples.description: A swept bullet punches a box stack it would otherwise pass clean through. Launch refires.

samples.name: Sensor Sweep
samples.description: A sensor volume sweeping through a stack — overlap begin/end reported without colliding.

samples.name: Hit
samples.description: Hit events from fast contacts, drawn as impact markers scaled by approach speed.

samples.name: Joint Break
samples.description: Distance joints under a rising load — each is cut when its reaction crosses a force threshold.

samples.name: Mover
samples.description: A kinematic capsule patrolling an arena on the plane solver — climbing steps and shoving crates.

samples.name: Ray Curtain
samples.description: A sweeping curtain of rays reporting the closest hit on a row of spinning shapes.

samples.name: Shape Cast
samples.description: Spheres swept through spinning shapes, each resolved to its first contact.

samples.name: Overlap Box
samples.description: A query box circling a grid — every shape it overlaps is outlined and counted.

samples.name: Terrain
samples.description: A sine-wave triangle mesh — shapes roll down the hills and settle in the troughs.

samples.name: Torus
samples.description: A flat torus mesh — balls balance on the ring or drop straight through the hole.

samples.name: Simple
samples.description: Four tilted slabs baked into one static body — a staircase spheres cascade down.

samples.name: Spheres
samples.description: A boulder of eighteen spheres in one static compound, pelted by a rain of boxes.

samples.name: Tile Floor
samples.description: A grid of tiles at random heights baked into one body — an uneven floor from a single compound.

samples.name: Large Pyramid
samples.description: A tall pyramid of heavy boxes — the canonical stacking-throughput stress at debug scale.

samples.name: Joint Grid
samples.description: A hanging sheet of spheres tied by spherical joints — the joint solver under a wide load.

exceptions.name: Rain
exceptions.reason: engine hangs inside a step once a second ragdoll column lands on the mesh field (~step 40), short of any horizon. Throughput benchmark, not an authoring scene.
